gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, as career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, where career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos among the dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
